title: osmanthus ilicifolius var. variegatus
intro: Osmanthus ilicifolius var. variegatus, also known as the Fragrant Tea Olive or Variegated Osmanthus, is a type of flowering plant in the Osmanthus genus, characterized by its fragrant flowers and variegated leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Osmanthus ilicifolius var. variegatus include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, essential oil, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
